title: Index on expression leads to an incorrect LEFT JOIN
poc: SELECT count(*) FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (x=y) WHERE ifnull(z, 0) >=0;
CREATE INDEX t2i ON t2(y, ifnull(z, 0));
SELECT count(*) FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (x=y) WHERE ifnull(z, 0) >=0;
key_bug_features: Index on expression causes incorrect LEFT JOIN results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(a TEXT, b INTEGER, c REAL);
CREATE INDEX t3i ON t3(a, ifnull(b, 0));
SELECT count(*) FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t3 ON (x=a) WHERE ifnull(c, 0) > 2;
SELECT count(*) FROM t3 LEFT JOIN t2 ON (b=y) WHERE ifnull(z, 0) < 0;
